source_pr.title: planner: reset recorded cte plan in plan encoder
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25174

Problem Summary:

planner encoder does not reset the recorded cte plan lead data race

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- reset recorded cte plan in plan encoder<!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: fix encode cte plan race.

evidence: evidence: fix encode cte plan race

analysis:
PR title: planner: reset recorded cte plan in plan encoder
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/25175
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: fix encode cte plan race
Changed files (2): planner/core/encode.go, planner/core/plan_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
